title: Gardener
content:
True Brahmin, in the morning meadows wet,
    Expound the Vedas of the violet,
    Or, hid in vines, peeping through many a loop,
    See the plum redden, and the beurr� stoop.
meaning:
"Gardener" is a quintessential example of Ralph Waldo Emerson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
